order: Apply and verify all six database recovery migrations while the old runtime remains active.
Set LEAD_ABUSE_HMAC_SECRET to a new production-only secret before the new send-lead runtime receives traffic.
Set LEAD_ABUSE_HMAC_SECRET_PREVIOUS only during a controlled secret rotation.
Verify P0_STAGING_SMOKE_HMAC_SECRET, P0_STAGING_SMOKE_ROTATION_ID and OUTBOUND_PROVIDER_MODE=suppress are absent from production.
Capture target identity, migration-history and P0-contract fingerprints immediately after Gate B.
Recheck the same three proofs immediately before the separately authorized application deploy.
